name: Cappuccino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine nuts, sugar, and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form cake pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream. Dissolve coffee granules and cinnamon in boiling water. Gradually mix into the cream cheese mixture, ensuring it's well combined.
3. Pour over the crust. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F; continue baking until set (about 1 hour). Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream and whole coffee beans if desired.
